name: quantize
description: Quantize — Node toolchain for TypeScript type generation (used from M1.3).
comment: Node 24 LTS is the project baseline. Generated artifacts (schema/quantize.schema.json, ts/quantize-ir.d.ts) are produced by `python -m quantize.codegen generate` and verified by `python -m quantize.codegen check`. Dependencies are exact-pinned and locked in package-lock.json; CI uses `npm ci` on Node 24. See docs/plans/M1_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md §7.
